startPoint.en: Talk to Kharshai via the trapdoor in Thorvald the Warrior's helmet shop in Rellekka.
startPoint.es: Habla con Kharshai a través de la trampilla en la tienda de cascos de Thorvald the Warrior en Rellekka.

children.title: A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen…
children.matchTitle: A Fairy Tale II - Cure a Queen

items.name: Vibrant memory
items.display: 7,500 vibrant memories (or memories of a higher tier); enriched memories count for double (collected during miniquest)

items.name: Macaw pouch
items.display: Macaw pouch or Ravenous locust pouch (for Zemouregal's memory)

rewards.display: 375,000 experience (given during the miniquest; 25,000 experience is awarded each time a memory is turned in)

rewards.name: Engrammeter
rewards.display: An engrammeter that Kharshai states could be useful in Freneskae when charged

rewards.name: Dr Nabanik's Old Trilby
rewards.display: Dr Nabanik's Old Trilby cosmetic override

text.en: Speak to Kharshai, located under the helmet shop in Rellekka. Agree to help him.
text.es: Habla con Kharshai, situado bajo la tienda de cascos en Rellekka. Acepta ayudarlo.

chatOptions: 3 I want to talk about the Mahjarrat memories.

text.en: With the engrammeter, head to any divination colony of vibrant wisps or higher. Fill it with 500 divine memories.
text.es: Con el engrammeter, dirígete a cualquier colonia de divinación de wisps vibrantes o superior. Llénalo con 500 recuerdos divinos.

text.en: You may utilise World 79 (Community Divination World) for more frequent enriched springs.
text.es: Puedes usar el Mundo 79 (Mundo Comunitario de Divinación) para conseguir manantiales enriquecidos con más frecuencia.

text.en: Visit the locations below, use the charged engrameter to collect the memory.
text.es: Visita las ubicaciones indicadas a continuación y usa el engrammeter cargado para recoger el recuerdo.

text.en: Return to Kharshai. Talk to him to give him the memory.
text.es: Vuelve con Kharshai. Habla con él para entregarle el recuerdo.

chatOptions: 3 I want to talk about the Mahjarrat memories.

text.en: Recharge the engrammeter with another 500 divine memories, and repeat for the remaining 14 memories.
text.es: Recarga el engrammeter con otros 500 recuerdos divinos y repite el proceso para los 14 recuerdos restantes.

rows: Wahisietel
Go to Nardah. Go to the Ali the Wise's house, the northern-most one from the Elidinis Statuette, and use the charged engrammeter there.
Azzanadra
Go to the Jaldraocht Pyramid. Use the engrammeter in the altar room.
Enakhra
Travel to Enakhra's Temple. Use the engrammeter in the central room.
Akthanakos
Travel to Enakhra's Temple. Use the ladder in the central room, go through the magic barrier and up the ladder. Use the engrammeter in the first chamber.
Bilrach
Go to Daemonheim. Use the engrammeter next to the banker.
Hazeel

Go south of Ardougne Zoo. Enter the cave entrance east of the Clock Tower. Take the raft, and enter the Hazeel Cultist headquarters. Use the engrammeter. See Hazeel Cult quest guide if you failed to do so.
Lucien
Go to Lucien's house, just west of the Grand Exchange, quickest using fairy ring DKR. Use the engrammeter inside.
Zemouregal
This next section will take you into the Wilderness.
Sliske
In the throne room (octagon-shaped room) of the Empyrean Citadel. Use the invitation box to teleport there quickly.
Mizzarch
Go to the Varrock Dig Site. Go down into the Senntisten Temple (north-east winch). Use the engrammeter in the altar room.
Jhallan

Go to the Erjolf's cave (east of Olaf Hradson, above the entrance to Keldagrim). Cross the river and enter the cave opening to the west. Use the engrammeter near the floating bridge to the centre island. Fairy code 'DKS' will place you just a few steps from the cave.
Palkeera
Go to the Mahjarrat Ritual Site. Use the engrammeter next to the ritual marker.
Lamistard
Go to Zemouregal's fort, west of the Mahjarrat Ritual Site. Go inside using the left side of the large front door. Use the engrammeter.
Ralvash
Go to Ghorrock. Go into the fortress courtyard, and use the engrammeter.
Kharshai
Go to Kharshai's cave, where you begin the miniquest. Use the engrammeter inside. (Skip this if you already completed this earlier.)

text.en: Take the final memory to Kharshai, receive your reward.
text.es: Lleva el último recuerdo a Kharshai y recibe tu recompensa.
